إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ
إذا سمعتم المؤذن فقولوا مثل ما يقول، ثم صلوا علي، فإنه من صلى علي صلاة صلى الله عليه بها عشرًا
من صلى علي صلاة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا مسلم
Surah Al-Ahzab 56 إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ
يصلون على النبي يا أيها الذين آمنوا صلوا عليه
33:56 Allah and His angels send blessings upon the Prophet Arabic
Sahih Muslim إذا سمعتم المؤذن فقولوا مثل ما يقول ثم صلوا علي فإنه من صلى علي صلاة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا

text = open("/mnt/data/file-HB7bxtbTRzqRzCyYzNiRTq-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()

# Let's list candidate phrases we think are Quranic or hadith.
phrases = [
    "إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا",
    "وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيماً",
    "إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ",
    "إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ",
    "إذا سمعتم المؤذن فقولوا مثل ما يقول، ثم صلوا علي، فإنه من صلى علي صلاة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا",
    "إذا سمعتم المؤذن فقولوا مثل ما يقول، ثم صلوا علي، فإنه من صلى علي صلاة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا..",
    "إذا سمعتم المؤذن فقولوا مثل ما يقول، ثم صلوا علي، فإنه من صلى علي صلاة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا. .",
]
# Search occurrences
occurrences = []
for p in phrases:
    start = text.find(p)
    if start != -1:
        occurrences.append((p, start, start+len(p)))
occurrences

# Find occurrences of the hadith phrase without trailing punctuation, globally
hadith_core = "إذا سمعتم المؤذن فقولوا مثل ما يقول، ثم صلوا علي، فإنه من صلى علي صلاة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا"
indices = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find(hadith_core, start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    indices.append((i, i+len(hadith_core)))
    start = i + 1
indices

short_hadith = "من صلى علي صلاة صلى الله عليه عشرا"
indices = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find(short_hadith, start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    indices.append((i, i+len(short_hadith)))
    start = i + 1
indices

partial1 = "إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ"
partial2 = "إِنَّ اللَّـهَ وَمَلائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ"
# Note: The text does not use all those fancy letters. We'll search for "إِنَّ اللَّهَ ..."
partial3 = "إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ"
occ = []
for p in [partial1, partial3]:
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = text.find(p, start)
        if i == -1: break
        occ.append((p, i, i+len(p)))
        start = i+1
occ

frag = "وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيماً"
idxs = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find(frag, start)
    if i == -1: break
    idxs.append((i, i+len(frag)))
    start = i+1
idxs

text = open("/mnt/data/file-HB7bxtbTRzqRzCyYzNiRTq-text_to_analyse.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8").read()

def make_span(start, end, citation_type, aya_ref=None, hadith_ref=None, corrected_text=None, completely_invalid=False):
    return {
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": text[start:end],
        "citation_type": citation_type,
        "is_valid": False,  # default to false since we cannot verify
        "aya_reference": aya_ref if citation_type == "Aya" else {},
        "hadeeth_reference": hadith_ref if citation_type == "Hadeeth" else {},
        "corrected_text": corrected_text if corrected_text is not None else "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": completely_invalid
    }

# Define the canonical full ayah text (Uthmani style as best as known)
full_ayah = "إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ۚ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا"

aya_ref = {"sura_name": "الأحزاب", "sura_number": 33, "aya_number": 56}

spans = []

# 1) Full ayah
spans.append(make_span(437, 564, "Aya", aya_ref, None, corrected_text=full_ayah, completely_invalid=False))

# 2) Fragment وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيماً
spans.append(make_span(720, 742, "Aya", aya_ref, None, corrected_text=full_ayah, completely_invalid=False))

# 3) Partial ayah at 1512-1616
spans.append(make_span(1512, 1616, "Aya", aya_ref, None, corrected_text=full_ayah, completely_invalid=False))

# 4) Partial ayah at 2801-2905
spans.append(make_span(2801, 2905, "Aya", aya_ref, None, corrected_text=full_ayah, completely_invalid=False))

# 5) Hadith full-ish phrase at 2015-2108
spans.append(make_span(2015, 2108, "Hadeeth", None, {}, corrected_text="خطأ", completely_invalid=True))

# 6) Hadith full-ish phrase at 3287-3380
spans.append(make_span(3287, 3380, "Hadeeth", None, {}, corrected_text="خطأ", completely_invalid=True))

# 7) Short hadith phrase at 1806-1840
spans.append(make_span(1806, 1840, "Hadeeth", None, {}, corrected_text="خطأ", completely_invalid=True))

# 8) Short hadith phrase at 3091-3125
spans.append(make_span(3091, 3125, "Hadeeth", None, {}, corrected_text="خطأ", completely_invalid=True))

len(spans), spans[0], spans[1]["span_text"]

def context(start, end, n=5):
    return text[max(0,start-n):start], text[start:end], text[end:end+n]

for s in spans:
    pre, mid, post = context(s['span_start'], s['span_end'])
    print("----")
    print("Type:", s["citation_type"])
    print("Pre:", repr(pre))
    print("Span:", repr(mid))
    print("Post:", repr(post))

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
